morning.title: Uber agrees to acquire Delivery Hero in a deal that values the German food delivery company at ~$14.8B
morning.summary: Uber acquires Delivery Hero for $14.8B, expanding its food delivery services.

morning.title: A US federal judge rules the State Department engaged in unconstitutional viewpoint discrimination
morning.summary: US judge rules State Department's visa denial to researchers studying misinfo and disinfo is unconstitutional.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquires Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: TSMC reports Q2 revenue up 36% YoY to ~$39.45B
morning.summary: TSMC reports significant revenue growth in Q2, driven by strong demand for its chips.

morning.title: Data center company Csquare raises $1.05B in its US IPO
morning.summary: Csquare raises $1.05B in its US IPO, valuing the company at $3.25B.

morning.title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
morning.summary: OpenAI develops GPT-Red, a super-hacker LLM designed to improve model safety.

morning.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
morning.summary: Anthropic's latest AI discovery has significant implications, but its limitations must also be considered.

morning.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem
morning.summary: Enterprise AI organizations face deployment challenges, not platform issues, and are calling chatbots agents.

morning.title: 1Password moves into AI cost management, betting that token spend is the next enterprise budget crisis
morning.summary: 1Password enters AI cost management, anticipating token spend will become a major enterprise budget concern.

morning.title: Windows 0-day drops the same day Microsoft releases record number of patches
morning.summary: Microsoft releases a record number of patches, but a new Windows 0-day vulnerability is discovered on the same day.

gym.title: How to Win Without Crushing Your Soul
gym.summary: Graham Weaver discusses how to achieve success without sacrificing one's well-being.

gym.title: How to Disagree Better
gym.summary: Julia Minson shares strategies for improving the way we disagree with others.

gym.title: Everything in Capital Markets is Downstream of Algorithms
gym.summary: The impact of algorithms on capital markets is discussed in this episode.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra explores the concept of real optimism and its benefits.

gym.title: The engineer of the future is the person who is able to choose what is worth doing
gym.summary: Addy Osmani discusses the importance of choosing what is worth doing in the future of engineering.
